raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identifies multiple consistency issues, including a misapplied citation, internal arithmetic inconsistency, and unclear metric conflation. The agent proposes minimal repairs for each issue.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision (Achiam et al., 2017), and identifies an unverifiable reference (Chen et al., 2025).",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence, disclosing uncertainty about the Chen et al. (2025) citation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no scope drift or unaddressed issues.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text, such as the misapplied Achiam et al. (2017) citation and unclear metric conflation.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including the recommended edits for each issue."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies multiple consistency issues, including a misapplied citation, internal arithmetic inconsistency, and unclear metric conflation. The agent proposes minimal repairs for each issue.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision (Achiam et al., 2017), and identifies an unverifiable reference (Chen et al., 2025).
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence, disclosing uncertainty about the Chen et al. (2025) citation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), with no scope drift or unaddressed issues.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text, such as the misapplied Achiam et al. (2017) citation and unclear metric conflation.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including the recommended edits for each issue.
